sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka sungah sisan lum a luan lai tengin,
Ka nuntakna hu abei ma in,
Man neilo kei bang lel
Hong teel man in nuam lua ing,
A migitna gengen ning

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lei pianma pek nangawn in kei hong teel,
Hong ciamteh zo, luah khawmzo ta ka hi ta tu'n,
Kha Siangtho hong guan,
A taak kelkel sisan te'n
Van kham khuapi nuam hong lutpih ta.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Pau banna neilo in mi siangtho bangin,
Hong seh khol khin zo, Ama mi ding in,
Ama lim le meel suun dingin hong ciamteh zoa,
Pasian innkuan ka hita.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Keima mi ahilo, keima mi dingin,
Ka itloh mite ka itmi dingin,
Keima mi hi kei uh teh ke'n kongcihsa hi napi,
"Ta te aw" kong ci ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tui duh dangtak in vul,ka om laitak in,
Sehnel gam keu ah ka zin lai in,
Sun nisa lelin kun ka om lai aw neem kaza,
Nuntakna tui ka dawn ta.
